name: Charter Oak Park
description: Charter Oak Park is a place to play pickleball in Peoria, IL. There are 4 outdoor concrete and asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms.

name: Elmwood Township Community Center
description: Elmwood Township Community Center is a place to play pickleball in Elmwood, IL. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.

name: Franciscan Recreation Complex
description: Franciscan Recreation Complex is a place to play pickleball in West Peoria, IL. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Greater Peoria Family YMCA
description: Greater Peoria Family YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Peoria, IL. There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include food, restrooms, water, and lights. A membership is required to play.

name: Hanna City Park District
description: Hanna City Park District is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Hanna City, IL. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Lakeview Rec. Center
description: Lakeview Rec. Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Peoria, IL. There are 4 indoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to food, restrooms, water, and locker rooms. The courts can be reserved.

name: Markin Courts - Bradley University
description: Markin Courts - Bradley University is a place to play pickleball in Peoria, IL. There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private. Amenities include lights.

name: Midwest Orthopedic Center
description: Midwest Orthopedic Center is a place to play pickleball in Peoria, IL. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private.

name: Pearce Community Center
description: Pearce Community Center is a place to play pickleball in Chillicothe, IL. There are 2 indoor wood courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like locker rooms and restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Reader Park
description: Reader Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Mapleton, IL. There is 1 outdoor asphalt court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The court cannot be reserved. Amenities include food and restrooms. The court is free.

name: Riverplex
description: Riverplex is a place to play pickleball in Peoria, IL. There are 4 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include food and water. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Shore Acres Park
description: Shore Acres Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Chillicothe, IL. There are 4 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.

name: The Clubs At River City
description: Come play pickleball at The Clubs At River City in Peoria, IL! There are 14 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms and trainers or lessons. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Weaveridge Tennis Court
description: Come play pickleball at Weaveridge Tennis Court in Peoria, IL! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private.

name: Westminster Presbyterian Church
description: Westminster Presbyterian Church is a place to play pickleball in Peoria, IL. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private.
